features: Glade Aerosol Air Freshener, Bubbly Berry Splash
description: Introducing the latest Glade air freshener scent � Bubbly Berry Splash. Make a splash and instantly refresh your home with a joyful burst of Raspberry, Blackberries, and a Splash of Champagne. Elevate the energy of any room with a fresh, original fragrance that is designed to tickle your playful side and fight tough odors. One of the latest additions to the Glade air freshener collection, the Bubbly Berry Splash fragrance is crafted by master perfumers and infused with essential oils. Have fun with the air in your home and add a refreshing spritz of personality to your space. Glade air deodorizers instantly refreshen rooms in your home. Thanks to tiny droplets, this air freshener spray leaves no starchy residue behind � just freshness that floats. This Glade spray is a great finishing touch to any cleaning routine. With a focus on mindful ingredients, this room air freshener is made without phthalates, parabens, nitro musk, and formaldehyde. It comes in a steel can that contains at least 10% post-consumer recycled material and is recyclable.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Indoor spaces such as kitchens, bathrooms, living rooms, and offices
